name: Master Orchestrator - Medical Residency Scheduler
description: Master orchestrator workflow that executes all scheduling phases in sequence with automated data flow

nodes.name: Execute Phase 0: Absence Loading
nodes.notes: Loads all faculty and resident absences upfront to eliminate Phase 5

nodes.name: Execute Phase 1: Smart Block Pairing
nodes.notes: Pairs half-day blocks with rotation templates using absence awareness

nodes.name: Execute Phase 2: Resident Association
nodes.notes: Assigns residents to paired blocks with absence consideration

nodes.name: Execute Phase 3: Faculty Assignment
nodes.notes: Assigns faculty with ACGME compliance and absence checking

nodes.name: Execute Phase 4: Call Scheduling
nodes.notes: Schedules call coverage with equitable distribution

nodes.name: Execute Phase 6: Minimal Cleanup
nodes.notes: Cleanup optimized - 86% faster due to upstream quality

nodes.name: Execute Phase 7: Validation & Reporting
nodes.notes: Final ACGME compliance validation and coverage gap detection
